name: Pasta with Sake Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/8 tsp Crushed dried hot red chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the clams and reserve the juice. In a 10-12 inch frying pan, combine half of the clam juice, onion, garlic, and 1/4 cup sake. Stir on high heat until about 1/4 of the liquid remains. Add the remaining sake, clams, and capers; simmer for 3-4 minutes. Keep warm.
2. Meanwhile, bring 4 quarts water to a boil in a 6-8 quart pan on high heat. Add the pasta; cook, uncovered, until tender to bite, about 8 minutes. Drain the pasta and pour into a wide bowl. Add the clam mixture. Lift and mix with 2 forks until most of the liquid is absorbed, about 1 minute. Top the pasta with parsley, cheese, and chilies.
